column1: Hey Clara, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Okay dope, which destination were we lookin at?
Yup! Great choice that's where I stayed last year
How many ppl in the group
Yea that's perfect. You all from the same school?
dope which school are we from
cool cool! i'll do a good group rate for y'all
Putting this info together for you now, how soon were you lookin to get something situated?
not super urgent, just wanting to see what we're looking at
okay gotcha. yea i'll send what we have now but just keep in mind prices do change as time goes on
i'll add the payment plan in there too which allows you to deposit and worry about most of it later
is it cool if I send thorugh email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if it came through. I can do $50 off the Occidental Punta Cana price you see there for y'all too
Hey how does this work if these dates have passed?
Oh no worries that's just a sample. When you're ready to get started we'll follow the dates in the email
I make a new reservation specifically for your group
Okay we can have the deposit by that date 10/10!
Yea sounds good that'll give you the perfect spread with the payment plan
I'll add in the payment plan and the $50 off for then too
Yay thank you! That cruise is free too if we pay the deposit?
Yea I'll add it in at the same rate
I'm in Punta Cana each year so I have some pull lol
Lol yea just lmk when, I'll set the reservation aside for you for now
Okay we want to do March 7-11 and add the party pass
Will set that up for you
we still thinkin 10sh ppl? I can always adjust just seeing how any slots to start with
8! We saw that 4 per room and that works perfect
Sorry could we also look at what flights you have?
yea no prob which airport would you be looking to fly out of? just to be real its def cheaper to get flights separately on your own but I'll see what we have
if its lookin like its too expensive ill help you find one
okay so heres the best gameplan to save you the most amount of $
I found a flight that you all can get on your own. its direct non stop, DFW to PUJ, american airlines
Let me know if that comes up for you
I also just emailed the reservation over so you have it
what's up claire checking in, how things going with you and the squad?
anyone have any questions before tomorrow?
Hey! I saw my name says Clare on the reservation. I don't want to get there and they say it's not me. Are you able to change it to Clara?
Hey, yea i got you I can change it when i'm back a little later
For sure, how's everyone else feelin?
About to make our deposit in a few!
Sounds good! Lmk if anyone has any questions, I'm here
So on paper, 4. BUT, if rooms are ready when you get in you'll be able to check in right away
If rooms aren't ready, you'll still be able to use the resort amenities. Eat, pool, etc
Yup! Looking at an early flight?
Hey we had someone join 2 rooms on accident. Are you able to take him out?
Yea which room did they want to be in
Can you move Ava to room 2 as well? Sorry
I'm sorry for blowing up your phone but I also can't chance my birthday and it's not correct
So room 1 Jackson, Dayne, you, and one open space for the 8th person?
Rooms updated. And what's your correct birthday?

Hey do you see all of our payments? Everyone has paid, the website says we paid on the 11th not the 10th. Im not sure if it's just a glitch but just we want to make sure we get the discount and booze cruise included.
Yup see everyones payments, y'all are all locked in with the party pass, booze cruise and discount
We get the party pass free too?
Excited for yall tho! As of now I'm gonna be there that week too
Hey I have a question. My paycheck was supposed to have hit by now and I'm talking to my boss. There were some errors with the system. Is there anyway I could make the payment first thing tomorrow?
How do we align flights and shuttles to take us to the resort?
2 of us had to get a different flight from the rest of the group. Are we able to get a shuttle for us a little later?
Hey what's up just enter your flight details onto your account. We schedule each persons transportation based on their arrival time. So it's okay if you have diff flights
Hey! Kenna Payne was wondering if she could pay $150 on Friday and then the rest $146 on January 9?
yea np will get that request in for her. should be fine
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have Ava and Dayne upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
hey is Dayne on the same flight as you?
I'll add it in if so
No his flight is different. Do you see his flight info now?
I see it, you guys are all good!
Hey! Is there a form we need to fill out to enter the Dominican Republic? The electric entry form
will send this in an email to everyone in your group as well
actually that was sent in an email already, did you all get that?
Oh I see it! Thank you!
yo! safe travels today. see y'all out here soon
Thank you!!! I was wondering if your shuttles are able to see our delayed flight? Right now we're scheduled to land 4:53
Oops! Ignore! Just saw the email lmao
Hey! so what time is the booze cruise tmrw? When should we be in the lobby?
Hey when does the last bus leave??
And there will be another afterward
Hey sorry! When does the bus leave for the cave tn?
hey sorry I missed this. did you get the bus okay?
